prBody:
## Summary

- **`CustomFoodFormView`** — validated SwiftUI form for creating user-defined `FoodItem` records. All required fields (name, calories/100g, protein, carbs, fat) are validated before the Save button is enabled; the item is persisted via `NutritionRepository.saveFoodItem` with `isCustom: true` so it surfaces in food search results alongside bundled foods.
- **`MealTemplatesView`** — lists saved `MealTemplate` records (newest first) with swipe-to-delete; tapping a template adds all its `MealTemplateItem` entries to the supplied `MealLog` via `NutritionRepository.addMealEntry`; a

toolbar button opens a sheet to persist the current meal log as a named template.
- **`MealTemplate` / `MealTemplateItem` models** — two new `@Model` classes registered in `AppSchemaV1`; `MealTemplate` cascade-deletes its `MealTemplateItem` children.
- **`MealTemplateTests`** — covers insert/fetch, cascade delete, schema registration, and the `isCustom` flag on user-created foods.

Closes #25
